title: Notion — The AI workspace that works for you
description: Build Custom Agents, search across all your apps, and automate busywork. The AI workspace where teams get more done, faster.

sections.title: The AI workspace that works for you.
sections.lede: Build Custom Agents, search across all your apps, and automate busywork. The AI workspace where teams get more done, faster.

sections.text: Forge-static approximation of notion.com authored from SSR-extractable headings + meta description. Pixel-rep rotation target per PlausiDen-Forge #222. Not affiliated with Notion; the substrate uses Notion as a reference shape for the editorial_purity_gate's workspace + agents audit.

sections.body: Meet the night shift. Notion agents keep work moving 24/7 — capturing knowledge, answering questions, and pushing projects forward while you sleep. Trusted by 98% of the Forbes Cloud 100.

sections.heading: Keep work moving 24/7.
sections.lede: Three agent surfaces that operate on the typed-block substrate — automate, answer, triage — so the human queue stays small and the work keeps moving while people sleep.

items.title: Automate
items.body: Automate repetitive work for your team. Agent flows that take a meeting note and route it to the right project, generate the status update, and prompt the assignee — without a templated form to fill in.

items.title: Answer
items.body: Answers questions instantly using knowledge you already have. Vector-indexed across the workspace + connected apps. Permission-respecting; the agent can't surface a doc the asker can't read.

items.title: Triage
items.body: Assigns, prioritizes, and routes tasks on its own. Project rules (escalation thresholds, owner-pool fallbacks, blocking dependencies) executed by the agent so the human queue stays small.

sections.text: Notion's substrate is the typed block — every doc, database row, calendar entry, and chat message is the same primitive shape. AI features compose against that single substrate rather than fragmented per-surface SDKs. The reference shape: one substrate beats N integrated tools.

sections.title: Open the live Notion site.
sections.lede: This is the Forge-static approximation. The actual product lives at the canonical URL.
